intake.title: Fix flaky CI in CLI watch mode
intake.description: Intermittent failures in watch mode integration tests. Includes changes in CLI command routing and test harness setup.
intake.author: octocat

riskFlags: CI failing; merge should be blocked
nextActions: Confirm reproduction details and expected behavior in issue/PR thread.
Assign primary owner and reviewer pair.
Stabilize CI before merge; capture failing test evidence.
Run CLI smoke tests and command routing regression checks.
Audit flaky tests for timing and environment coupling.
Escalate to on-call lead and require explicit human approval gate.

agentOutputs.lead: Prioritize PR #1842 as HIGH and enforce approval before merge. [fallback used: LLM provider set to fallback mode]
agentOutputs.developer: Assess impacted areas: cli, tests. Draft minimal safe fix and rollback plan. [fallback used: LLM provider set to fallback mode]
agentOutputs.tester: Design focused regression checks for affected modules and verify CI stability. [fallback used: LLM provider set to fallback mode]
agentOutputs.scribe: Publish triage summary, risks, and action checklist to the team thread. [fallback used: LLM provider set to fallback mode]
